name: Shifting
description: As a bonus action, you can shift into a more bestial appearance for up to 1 minute or until you use a bonus action to revert. While shifted you gain temporary hit points equal to 2 × your proficiency bonus. You can shift a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and all expended uses are regained after a long rest. When you shift you choose one of the following options: Beasthide – you gain an additional 1d6 temporary hit points and a +1 bonus to AC while shifted; Longtooth – while shifted you can use a bonus action on your turn to make an unarmed strike with your fangs that deals 1d6 + your Strength modifier piercing damage on a hit; Swiftstride – your speed increases by 10 feet while shifted, and you can use a reaction to move up to 10 feet when a creature ends its turn within 5 feet of you, without provoking opportunity attacks; Wildhunt – you have advantage on Wisdom checks while shifted, and no creature within 30 feet of you can have advantage on an attack roll against you unless you are incapacitated.

mechanics.name: Shift
mechanics.duration: 1 minute or until you end it

effect.trigger: creature ends its turn within 5 feet
